title: primula tenella var. flagellaris
intro: Primula tenella var. flagellaris is a rare and endangered variety of the Primula tenella plant, commonly known as the lesser primrose or primrose of the Alps. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory qualities, which can be used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Primula tenella var. flagellaris include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
